question: What is the price of an annual ATM transit pass for students under 27 in Milan, and how does it compare with the standard adult annual urban pass?
answer:
The annual student ATM pass costs **about €200**. [source: relocation/www-collegiate-it-quanto-costa-studiare-a-milano.md]

I don’t have information on the **standard adult annual urban pass** in the available sources, so I can’t compare the two annual prices.

question: List the steps an international student must follow to register with Italy's National Health Service (SSN) in Milan.
answer:
1. **Check your category and eligibility.** EU/EEA/Swiss students in Italy for study reasons for more than 3 months can register with the Regional Health Service (SSR). [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-campus-life-health-service.md] Non-EU students in Italy for study reasons with a residence permit longer than 3 months can register with the SSR. [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-campus-life-national-health-service.md]

2. **Go to a “Scelta e Revoca” counter at ATS Milano.** Registration is done in person at the “Scelta e Revoca” counter at ATS Milano. [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-campus-life-national-health-service.md]

3. **Bring the required documents.**  
   - **EU/EEA/Swiss students:** bring a photocopy of a valid ID, fiscal code, and completed S1 form. [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-campus-life-health-service.md]  
   - **Non-EU students:** bring a valid residence permit or receipt of first residence permit request, self-certification of residence/habitual domicile, Italian fiscal code, and receipt of payment for voluntary SSN registration. [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-campus-life-national-health-service.md]

4. **Pay the annual fee if you are registering voluntarily.** Non-EU students must provide the receipt of payment made by postal order to c/c 379222, addressed to “Amministrazione P.T. Regione Lombardia,” with reason “iscrizione volontaria al SSN.” [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-campus-life-national-health-service.md]

5. **Choose your doctor during registration.** Registration with the Regional Health Service involves choosing a medico curante, normally among doctors in your local area. [source: relocation/www-serviziterritoriali-asstmilano-it-servizi-iscrizione-al-servizio-sanitario-regionale-e-scelta-del-medico.md]

6. **Receive your health card.** At registration, you receive a temporary paper health card, and the Carta Regionale dei Servizi is usually sent to your residence address within about one month. [source: relocation/www-serviziterritoriali-asstmilano-it-servizi-iscrizione-al-servizio-sanitario-regionale-e-scelta-del-medico.md]

question: Confrontando i bus diretti da Malpensa a Milano Centrale tra i vettori documentati (Autostradale/Malpensa Bus Express, Terravision, Flibco, FlixBus): qual e' il prezzo di partenza piu' basso indicato per ciascun vettore?
answer:
Ecco il confronto dei prezzi di partenza più bassi indicati:

| Vettore | Prezzo di partenza più basso indicato | Nota |
|---|---:|---|
| Autostradale / Malpensa Bus Express | **da 4,99€ a persona** | Nella stessa fonte è anche indicato “biglietto singolo: a partire da 8 euro”; il valore più basso riportato è 4,99€. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |
| Terravision | **a partire da 6 euro** | La fonte indica biglietti online “a partire da 6-10 euro”. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |
| Flibco | **a partire da circa 8 euro** | La fonte indica biglietti “a partire da circa 8-10 euro”. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |
| FlixBus | **non documentato per Malpensa–Milano Centrale** | La fonte indica FlixBus da Malpensa verso varie città italiane ed europee, con biglietti da circa 6 euro, ma non documenta un collegamento diretto Malpensa–Milano Centrale. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |

question: Quale documento devo portare per accedere alla Biblioteca Bocconi, e qual e' la capienza massima dell'edificio?
answer:
Per accedere alla Biblioteca Bocconi devi portare la tua Bocconi ID card oppure usare il QRcode generato tramite yoU@B student diary. [source: life_on_campus/bit-unibocconi-it-hc-en-us-articles-4405876182418-how-do-i-get-into-the-library.md]

La capienza massima della Biblioteca è di 720 persone. [source: life_on_campus/bit-unibocconi-it-hc-en-us-articles-4405876182418-how-do-i-get-into-the-library.md]

question: Provide a structured table of the dining areas available on the Bocconi campus, indicating the location of each and its meal/opening pattern.
answer:
| Dining area | Location | Meal / opening pattern |
|---|---|---|
| GUD Milano Bocconi | Via Roentgen 1, Grafton Building, ground floor [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] | Open Monday to Friday for breakfast, lunch and happy hour [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] |
| Bar Paninoteca Fast Food | Via Sarfatti 25, main building, floor -1 [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] | Open Monday to Friday for breakfast and lunch [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-funding-dining-areas.md] |
| Self-service | Via Bocconi 12, Pensionato building, floor -1 [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] | Open Monday to Saturday for lunch and dinner, 11:45–14:30 and 19:00–20:30 [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] |
| Self-service closure pattern | Via Bocconi 12 [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-funding-dining-areas.md] | Closed on Sundays, holidays including midweek holidays, and during communicated suspension/closure periods [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-funding-dining-areas.md] [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] |

question: For the Bocconi MSc graduate Exchange Program selection score, how are academic GPA, credits, and Bachelor degree grade weighted? Show the weights and explain.
answer:
For the Bocconi MSc graduate Exchange Program 2026-27, the selection score is based on **merit** and weighted as follows: [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md]

| Component | Weight | Meaning |
|---|---:|---|
| Academic weighted credit average (**WA**) | **50%** | Your Bocconi weighted GPA/average on credits. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md] |
| Credits earned ratio (**NC / MAX NC**) | **20%** | The number of credits earned divided by the maximum number of credits that can be earned. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md] |
| Bachelor final degree grade — **Laurea Triennale** | **30%** | Your final Bachelor degree grade. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md] |

The resulting score is then **multiplied by 1000** to obtain the final score. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md]

For the credits calculation, Bocconi counts exams from the **1st year, 1st semester study plan** officially taken by **February 3rd, 2026** included. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md] Exams outside that study plan, such as **internship, languages, anticipated exams, and anticipated curricular supplementary activities**, are not included. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md]

question: What is the application deadline for the Bocconi Double Degree program with MIT (Massachusetts Institute of Technology)?
answer:
There is no Bocconi Double Degree program with MIT in the available sources; the available Double Degree sources describe the program/timeline but do not list MIT. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-double-degree-program-double-degree-selection-during-1st-ye.md] [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-double-degree-program-application-selection-timeline-referr.md]

For the Double Degree program generally, applications for all MSc programs run from **November 12 to November 27, 2025, 11:59pm**. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-double-degree-program-application-selection-timeline-referr.md]

question: How many different paid Bocconi Sport Membership tiers are listed for the 2025/2026 season, and which is the cheapest one available to UB and SDA Bocconi students?
answer:
The available source lists **6 Bocconi Sport Membership tiers** for the 2025/2026 season: **3 student tiers** and **3 community tiers**; the Community Premium Fee is listed, but its price is not shown in the available text. [source: life_on_campus/www-bocconisport-eu-en-news-bocconi-sport-membership.md]

For **UB and SDA Bocconi students**, the cheapest option is the **Student Membership Fee**, at **€27.00**. [source: life_on_campus/www-bocconisport-eu-en-news-bocconi-sport-membership.md]
